newer_content: The default database has been migrated to PostgreSQL 14.

older_content: The API server listens on port 3000.
newer_content: The API server was moved to port 8080 after the port conflict.

older_content: Authentication is handled by JWT tokens.
newer_content: Authentication was switched to session cookies after the security audit.
The cache layer was migrated to Valkey after Redis license change.
We migrated deployment from Docker Swarm to Kubernetes.
The embedding model was upgraded to BGE-M3 after benchmarking.
The frontend was rewritten in React 18 during the Q2 migration.
CI/CD was migrated from Jenkins to GitHub Actions.
The message queue was replaced with Apache Kafka for higher throughput.
The search engine was replaced by OpenSearch after the fork.
